$schema: Shopify Blogs inventory — blog handle list. Article enumeration is deferred (large dataset, mostly historical and unpublished).
$source: Shopify Admin GraphQL (la-mattress.myshopify.com) via MCP, 2026-05-04. Article handles populated by scripts/pull-inventory.mjs.
$articlesNote: Article handles per blog are not enumerated in this snapshot. Run `node scripts/pull-inventory.mjs` (with Admin token + read_content scope) to populate every article handle for /blogs/[blog]/[article] route generation. The brief defers /blog/* routes to a separate scoping pass (design-handoff/01-overview.md — 'Blog / editorial CMS pass not yet scoped').

$articleSamplesObserved.beds-mattresses: 100+ historical posts, mostly unpublished (many redirected to /collections/mattresses)
